news.title: Bank of America taps new leaders to bridge crypto, AI and traditional finance
news.summary: Sonali Theisen was named head of BofA's global digital assets platform, while Kevin Milsom was tapped to serve as head of AI transformation

news.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
news.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

news.title: 某巨鲸通过Galaxy Digital OTC出售3万枚ETH，价值5,500万美元
news.summary:
【某巨鲸通过Galaxy Digital OTC出售3万枚ETH，价值5,500万美元】金色财经报道，7月18日，据 Onchain Lens 监测，某巨鲸通过 Galaxy Digital OTC 出售 3 万枚 ETH，兑换为 5,500 万枚 USDC，随后将资金存入 Coinbase。

原文链接: https://x.com/OnchainLens/status/2078242088618226030
